questions: credit card e pay kora jay?
answers: Apnar bill pay korar jonno bKash, Nagad, Rocket, bank transfer, ba amader website theke online pay korte paren. ISP Digital shob popular payment method support kore!
bKash e pay korte: bKash app open korun > Pay Bill > Internet/ISP > ISP Digital select korun > Apnar customer ID diye pay korun. Khub easy!
Apnar bill er due date protimasher 10 tarikhe. Due date er por 100 taka late fee add hobe, tai time moto pay kore deben!
Invoice dekhte amader website te login korun ba app e giye 'Billing' section e jan. PDF invoice download korte parben. Email eoo pathiye dei amra!
ISP Digital e auto-pay setup korte paren bKash ba bank account link kore. Settings > Auto Pay te giye setup korun, ar tension free thakun!
Advance bill pay korte paren 3, 6, ba 12 mash er jonno. Advance e pay korle special discount paben! 6 masher jonno 5% ar 12 masher jonno 10% discount.
Apnar payment confirm hoye geche kintu reflect korte 1-2 ghonta somoy lagte pare. Jodi 24 ghontar moddhe update na hoy, amader helpline e call korun.
Credit card, debit card, bKash, Nagad, Rocket, bank transfer shob option e bill pay kora jay. ISP Digital maximum convenience ensure kore apnader jonno!
Bill e kono vul thakle amader billing department e contact korun (09612-000000). Amra 24 ghontar moddhe verify kore correct kore dibo.
Apnar payment history dekhte ISP Digital app ba website e login korun, tarpor 'Payment History' section e click korun. Shob transaction record paben okhane.
